post_tap_contract.summary: Four-device live evidence shows the claim tap resolving into a reward-acquired overlay or a direct claimed/result state, not the strict confirm-modal contract.

metadata.notes: The canonical reward-panel-open golden and claim-button baseline are both approved live zh-TW ROX screenshots. The confirm-modal baseline remains a curated stand-in until an approved live modal capture is available. Round-8 now lands reviewed supporting evidence from all four confirmed ADB-visible devices, and every reviewed live post-tap outcome still resolves to a reward-result surface instead of the strict confirm-modal contract.

goldens.proves: Shows the opened daily-sign-in reward panel on live zh-TW ROX UI and serves as the canonical panel-open golden for anchor verification.
limitations: does not prove that the claim button is currently tappable

goldens.proves: Shows the live claimable day-7 reward panel state with an enabled orange reward button before the tap.
limitations: captures one approved live day-7 claimable panel only
does not prove that every account/day-state exposes the same claimable layout
does not document the post-tap confirmation modal

goldens.proves: Shows the confirmation modal state that appears after tapping the claim button and anchors the confirm-state crop.
limitations: no approved live zh-TW confirmation modal was available on the reachable accounts during this round
four-device live post-tap evidence resolves into reward-result surfaces instead of the reward confirmation modal
live negative-case evidence exists for a generic confirmation dialog, but not for the reward confirmation modal
tracks one curated modal layout only

supporting_captures.proves: Keeps a descriptive live-capture filename for the canonical panel-open screenshot so downstream tooling and manual review can refer to the raw evidence directly.
supporting_captures.failure_case: Use when inspecting why the reward panel did not open or why the wrong reward page was captured.

supporting_captures.proves: Shows the live zh-TW ROX entry context immediately after tapping the Fu Li menu and before the daily sign-in reward panel opens.
supporting_captures.failure_case: Use when navigation reaches Fu Li but never advances to the reward-panel-open anchor.

supporting_captures.proves: Shows the live zh-TW daily-sign-in panel with greyed controls and no enabled claim affordance, so panel-open success is not mistaken for a claimable state.
supporting_captures.failure_case: Use when the flow opens daily sign-in but the claim button is missing, disabled, or already consumed.

supporting_captures.proves: Shows the Kingdom Pass rewards page, a reward-like surface that should not satisfy the daily sign-in reward panel success check.
supporting_captures.failure_case: Use when Fu Li navigation lands on a reward surface that looks plausible but is not the daily sign-in panel.

supporting_captures.proves: Shows a generic exit-game confirmation dialog captured during reward exploration; this modal must not be treated as the reward claim confirmation state.
supporting_captures.failure_case: Use when a generic confirmation dialog interrupts reward navigation or claim attempts and the expected reward confirmation modal never appears.

supporting_captures.proves: Shows the live reward-acquired overlay that appeared immediately after the day-7 claim tap on emulator-5556.
supporting_captures.failure_case: Use when the claim tap resolves into the reward-acquired overlay instead of the explicit reward confirmation modal contract.
supporting_captures.notes: This is useful live post-tap evidence, but it is not a like-for-like replacement for the confirm-modal anchor because the overlay hides the modal action surface.

supporting_captures.proves: Shows the immediate claimed/result state that appeared on 127.0.0.1:5559 right after tapping the live claim button, without surfacing the reward confirmation modal.
supporting_captures.failure_case: Use when the claim tap resolves directly into a claimed/result state instead of the explicit reward confirmation modal contract.
supporting_captures.notes: This capture strengthens the four-device evidence that live post-tap behavior does not match the current curated confirm-modal contract.

supporting_captures.proves: Shows the immediate claimed/result state that appeared on 127.0.0.1:5563 right after tapping the live claim button, without surfacing the reward confirmation modal.
supporting_captures.failure_case: Use when the claim tap resolves directly into a claimed/result state instead of the explicit reward confirmation modal contract.
supporting_captures.notes: This capture strengthens the four-device evidence that live post-tap behavior does not match the current curated confirm-modal contract.

supporting_captures.proves: Shows the immediate claimed/result state that appeared on emulator-5560 right after tapping the live claim button, without surfacing the reward confirmation modal.
supporting_captures.failure_case: Use when the claim tap resolves directly into a claimed/result state instead of the explicit reward confirmation modal contract.
supporting_captures.notes: This capture strengthens the four-device evidence that live post-tap behavior does not match the current curated confirm-modal contract.
